nasb.text: “When you gather the grapes of your vineyard, you shall not go over it again; it shall be for the alien, for the orphan, and for the widow.

esv.text: When you gather the grapes of your vineyard, you shall not strip it afterward. It shall be for the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow.

cnv.text: 你收取葡萄園的葡萄以後，剩下的不可再摘，要留給寄居的、孤兒和寡婦。

ccb.text: 你们摘葡萄时，摘过一次后不可再摘，要把剩下的留给孤儿寡妇和寄居者。
